name: Scoobeez Global, Inc.
summary: Scoobeez Global, Inc. provides on-demand logistics and delivery services in California and Texas. It offers door to door delivery service that facilitates same day deliveries for enterprise clients. The company was formerly known as ABT Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to Scoobeez Global, Inc. in March 2017. Scoobeez Global, Inc. was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Glendale, California. On April 30, 2019, Scoobeez Global, Inc. filed a voluntary petition for reorganization under Chapter 11 in the U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the Central District of California. It is in joint administration with Scoobeez.
